title: MrFeg's Image Frame
description: Personalize your world with high-quality custom images! MrFEG's Image Frame allows you to import and display any .png or .jpg file directly onto blocks in your world.
body:
![MrFEG's Image Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dfcceb8bd0221548c09d2d83308a14cdfd0bc6c.png)

# **🖼️ MrFEG's Image Frame**

Bring your own photos, custom designs, and posters into Minecraft without the usual headaches! Whether you’re setting up a professional art gallery, decorating your base, or building a massive digital billboard, MrFEG's Image Frame is designed to handle custom textures cleanly and efficiently.

**✨ Features**

**Direct Import**: Supports both .png and .jpg files.

**Custom Scaling**: Set specific height and width values in-game to get the perfect fit for your builds.

**Easy Management**: A dedicated folder makes it simple to add or remove images without restarting.

**🛠️ How to Use**

**Get the Block**: Currently available in the Creative Tab under Functional Blocks (or search "Image Frame"). Note: Survival crafting recipes are planned for a future update.

**Add Your Images**: Place your image files into the ImageMod_Images folder located inside your main Minecraft directory.

**Configure**: Right-click the Image Frame block in-game, select your file from the list, and enter your desired dimensions.
